blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: Tulsi. Ocimum sanctum. This is supposed to be Vrinda who was transformed into a plant by Vishnu. It is held sacred to him and is married to him every year. It is a great purifier of the atmosphere and is said to destroy mosquitoes. The Vaishnavas wear a necklace made of bits of the stem of this plant. (See Tulsi's Marriage for folklore.)

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: Umbar. Ficus glomerata, is the seat of the Trimurti or Dattātreya. It is much worshiped, and women desirous of getting sons go round it a thousand times every morning. Its dry wood is used for producing sacrificial fire.
